summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TRACEGUARD personal safety system. Backend APIs are highly functional (92.3% success rate) with real-time location tracking, evidence capture, and emergency features working. Frontend authentication integration issue identified preventing full UI testing.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 400 'No contacts to alert' when user has no contacts
minor_issues.impact: Expected behavior but should be more graceful

working_features: Background scheduler for trip overdue and geofence checks

critical_bugs.issue: Login form shows loading spinner but doesn't complete authentication

integration_issues.issue: React frontend cannot complete login despite backend API working correctly
integration_issues.details: API login returns valid JWT token via curl, but frontend form fails to process response

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix frontend authentication integration. Backend APIs work correctly but React login form cannot complete authentication flow. Check AuthContext.js, token handling, and API response processing in the frontend login component.
